titleStmt.title: SII 17.728: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 728. (A.R. No. 671 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the central shrine in the Māśilāmaṇiśvara temple.
The cyclic year Vikrama cited in the record fell in Śaka 1322. The king may be identified with Harihara II.

This inscription records the gift of some materials used in worship (tirumuṭṭu) such as tiruvaṭṭaṇaikkāl, tiruvandikkāppu-taṭṭi and taḷigai, in all weighing 200 (palam) by Naṟpākkiḻāṉ Koṟṟaḷappāṉ Śūriyadēvaṉ of Ākuḍi-nāḍu to the deity Tirumullaivāyaluḍaiya nāyiṉār at Kāṉappēṟūr-nāḍu. It also records an endowment of 25 paṇam by Śūriyappiḷḷai, towards the supply of ghee when the tiruvandikkāppu ceremony is conducted.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaliśvara Ariyararkkuc cellā niṉṟa vikkirama varuṣam jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟ(k)koṭṭattu
kāṉappeṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyil Uṭaiya nāyiṉāṟkku Ikkoṭṭattil Ākuṭināṭ ṭil kolaṭiyil
naṟpākkiḻāṉ koṟṟaḷappāṉ cūriyatevaṉ Iṭṭa tirumuṭṭu tiruvaṭṭaṇaikkā liraṇṭiṉā liṭai nūṟum
tiruvantik kāppu taṭṭi Iraṇṭiṉā liṭai Aimpatum taḷikai Oṉṟuṉā liṭai Aiympatum Āka tiru muṭṭu Añcunāl
Iṭai Irunūṟum caṉtirātittavarai naṭakkumpaṭikku cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai
naṟpākkiḻāṉ cūriyatevaṉ Eḻuttu śrīmāheśvararakṣai Ittiruvantikkāpputaṭṭi Iraṇṭukku
m tirumuṉ paṇi māṟukaiyil
vāṟkkum neyikku cūriyap piḷḷai
pakkal nāṅkaḷ paṟṟik koṇṭa
� 2 10 5 kkum palicaikkuc cilavāka
cantirātittavarai vārppatākac ci
lālekai paṇṇi kuṭuttom
Digital edition of SII 17.728 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
